def img_edit_geminiv2(image_base64_list, genaimessages):  
    # if not isinstance(image_base64_list, list):
    #     raise ValueError("The input must be a list of base64-encoded images.")

    model = "gemini-2.0-flash-exp"
    client = google_genai.Client(
        vertexai=True,
        project="lft-ai",
        location="us-central1"
    )

    # Construct content
    if not image_base64_list:  # Check if the list is empty
        contents = [
            genai_types.Content(
                role="user",
                parts=[
                    genai_types.Part.from_text(text="Generate image:\n" + genaimessages)
                ]
            )
        ]
    else:
        # Convert the list of base64 strings into Part objects
        image_parts = [
            genai_types.Part.from_bytes(
                data=image_base64,
                mime_type="image/png"
            ) for image_base64 in image_base64_list
        ]

        contents = [
            genai_types.Content(
                role="user",
                parts=image_parts + [  # Add all image Parts
                    genai_types.Part.from_text(text="Generate image:\n" + genaimessages)
                ]
            )
        ]

    generate_content_config = genai_types.GenerateContentConfig(
        temperature=1,
        top_p=0.95,
        max_output_tokens=8192,
        response_modalities=["TEXT", "IMAGE"],
        safety_settings=[
            genai_types.SafetySetting(
                category="HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH",
                threshold="OFF"
            ),
            genai_types.SafetySetting(
                category="HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT",
                threshold="OFF"
            ),
            genai_types.SafetySetting(
                category="HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT",
                threshold="OFF"
            ),
            genai_types.SafetySetting(
                category="HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT",
                threshold="OFF"
            )
        ],
    )

    generated_results = []

    # response = client.models.generate_content(
    #     model=model,
    #     contents=contents,
    #     config=generate_content_config,
    # )
    # # st.write(response)
    # if response:
    #     if response.candidates:
    #         # st.write(chunk.candidates)
    #         # app_util.log_to_console(str(chunk.candidates))
    #         for candidate in response.candidates:
    #             if candidate.finish_message:
    #                 generated_results.append(["finish_message",candidate.finish_message])
    #             if candidate.content and candidate.content.parts:
    #                 for part in candidate.content.parts:
    #                     # st.write(part)
    #                     # If part has text, append to generated_texts
    #                     if getattr(part, 'text', None):
    #                         # print("Text in part:", part.text)
    #                         generated_results.append(["text",part.text])

    #                     # If part has inline_data and is an image, append to generated_images
    #                     if hasattr(part, 'inline_data') and part.inline_data:
    #                         if part.inline_data.mime_type == 'image/png':
    #                             generated_results.append(["image",part.inline_data.data])

    for chunk in client.models.generate_content_stream(
        model=model,
        contents=contents,
        config=generate_content_config,
    ):
        if chunk.candidates:
            app_util.log_to_console(str(chunk.candidates))
            for candidate in chunk.candidates:
                if candidate.finish_message:
                    generated_results.append(["finish_message",candidate.finish_message])
                if candidate.content and candidate.content.parts:
                    # if candidate.finish_message:
                    #     print("Finish message:", candidate.finish_message)
                    for part in candidate.content.parts:
                        # If part has text, append to generated_texts
                        if getattr(part, 'text', None):
                            # print("Text in part:", part.text)
                            generated_results.append(["text",part.text])

                        # If part has inline_data and is an image, append to generated_images
                        if hasattr(part, 'inline_data') and part.inline_data:
                            if part.inline_data.mime_type == 'image/png':
                                generated_results.append(["image",part.inline_data.data])
                            # else:
                            #     print("Unsupported mime_type:", part.inline_data.mime_type)

    return generated_results

def download_model_file(url):
    """
    从URL下载模型文件并保存到临时目录
    支持OBJ和GLB格式
    """
    try:
        response = requests.get(url)
        if response.status_code == 200:
            # 保存到临时目录
            tmpdir = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()
            parsed_url = urlparse(url)
            path = parsed_url.path
            file_name = Path(path).name  # 只取路径部分最后的文件名
            file_name = unquote(file_name)  # 解码 %xx
            
            # 检查文件扩展名
            file_ext = Path(file_name).suffix.lower()
            if file_ext not in ['.obj', '.glb']:
                # 根据URL判断可能的文件类型
                if 'glb' in url.lower():
                    file_name = "model.glb"
                else:
                    file_name = "model.obj"
            
            model_path = Path(tmpdir.name) / file_name
            model_path.write_bytes(response.content)
            return model_path, tmpdir
        else:
            st.error(f"Error downloading model: HTTP status code {response.status_code}")
            return None, None
    except Exception as e:
        st.error(f"Error downloading model: {str(e)}")
        return None, None

def getimg(task_id):
    conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.goapi.ai")
    payload = task_id
    task_url = "/api/v1/task/" + payload
    headers = {
        'x-api-key': 'ea5398c06585f706a1a116a94a7fee23538d3a5d970794dba5255b0da5763578'
    }
    max_attempts = 150  # 最大尝试次数
    attempt = 0
    image_url = None
    while attempt < max_attempts:
        time.sleep(2)  # 每2秒检查一次
        conn.request("GET", task_url, payload, headers)
        res = conn.getresponse()
        data = res.read()

        response = json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))
        image_url = response.get("data", {}).get("output", {}).get("image_url")
        
        if image_url:
            print(f"Image URL: {image_url}")
            break
        print(f"Attempt {attempt + 1}/{max_attempts}: Waiting for image generation...")
        attempt += 1
            


    return image_url

def split_image_into_four(img):
    width, height = img.size
    # 计算每个部分的大小
    part_width = width // 2
    part_height = height // 2
    
    # 创建四个部分
    top_left = img.crop((0, 0, part_width, part_height))
    top_right = img.crop((part_width, 0, width, part_height))
    bottom_left = img.crop((0, part_height, part_width, height))
    bottom_right = img.crop((part_width, part_height, width, height))
    
    return [top_left, top_right, bottom_left, bottom_right]

def upload_image(image, 
                 img_file_name: str, 
                 image_type: str = "png", 
                 overwrite: bool = False,
                 server_address: str = server_address,
                 token: str = TOKEN) -> dict:
    """
    同时支持本地文件、URL或 base64/内存数据的图片上传。
    
    参数:
    - image: 
        若为字符串且以 http:// 或 https:// 开头，则视为 URL。
        若为字符串且本地存在对应路径，则视为本地文件。
        否则视为 base64 字符串。
    - img_file_name: 上传后图片在服务器端存储的文件名
    - image_type: 图片类型，例如 'png', 'jpg' 等
    - overwrite: 是否覆盖同名文件
    - server_address: 服务器地址
    - token: 鉴权 token
    
    返回值:
    - 成功时返回服务器响应的 JSON 反序列化结果
    """
    # 1. 判断传入的 image 类型并获取图片数据
    if isinstance(image, str):
        if image.startswith(('http://', 'https://')):
            # 如果是 URL，直接下载
            response = requests.get(image, verify=verify_ssl)
            image_bytes = response.content
        elif os.path.isfile(image):
            # 如果是本地文件
            with open(image, 'rb') as f:
                image_bytes = f.read()
        else:
            # 否则视为 base64 字符串
            image_bytes = base64_str_to_image(image)
    else:
        # 如果不是字符串，假定是字节数据
        image_bytes = image

    file_obj = io.BytesIO(image_bytes)

    # 2. 构造 multipart/form-data
    fields = {
        'image': (img_file_name, file_obj, f"image/{image_type}"),
        'type': "input",
        'overwrite': str(overwrite).lower()
    }
    multipart_data = MultipartEncoder(fields=fields)
    headers = {'Content-Type': multipart_data.content_type}

    # 3. 发送请求
    protocol = "https" if use_https else "http"
    url = f"{protocol}://{server_address}/upload/image?token={token}"
    response = requests.post(url, data=multipart_data, headers=headers, verify=verify_ssl)

    # 4. 检查响应并返回
    if response.status_code == 200:
        return response.json()
    else:
        raise Exception(f"图片上传失败，状态码: {response.status_code}, 响应信息: {response.text}")

def queue_prompt(prompt):
    """
    发送 prompt(也就是工作流) 到 /prompt 接口队列，获取 prompt_id
    """
    start_time = time.time()
    # logger.info("正在发送工作流到队列...")
    
    p = {"prompt": prompt, "client_id": client_id}
    data = json.dumps(p).encode('utf-8')
    protocol = "https" if use_https else "http"
    url = f"{protocol}://{server_address}/prompt?token={TOKEN}"
    
    # logger.info(f"请求URL: {url}")
    # logger.info(f"请求数据: {json.dumps(p, indent=2)}")

    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
        context = None
        if not verify_ssl and use_https:
            import ssl
            context = ssl._create_unverified_context()
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=context) as resp:
            response_str = resp.read().decode('utf-8')
            result = json.loads(response_str)
            
        end_time = time.time()
        # logger.info(f"工作流已提交 - 耗时: {end_time - start_time:.2f}秒")
        return result
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        error_body = e.read().decode('utf-8')
        # logger.error(f"HTTP错误: {e.code} - {e.reason}")
        # logger.error(f"错误响应: {error_body}")
        raise Exception(f"提交工作流失败: {e.code} - {e.reason} - {error_body}")
    except Exception as e:
        # logger.error(f"发送工作流时出错: {str(e)}")
        raise

def poll_result_until_ready(prompt_id, poll_interval=2, max_tries=45):  # 默认 45 次尝试 × 2 秒 = 90 秒超时
    """
    使用轮询方式，反复调用 get_history(prompt_id)，
    当检测到有 outputs 输出时，认为生成结束并返回对应的记录
    """
    for i in range(max_tries):
        hist_resp = get_history(prompt_id)
        record = hist_resp.get(prompt_id, {})
        outputs = record.get('outputs', {})
        
        if outputs:
            # 有输出信息了，说明生成完成
            return record
        
        # logger.info(f"还未生成完成，等待 {poll_interval} 秒后重试... (已尝试 {i+1}/{max_tries} 次)")
        # logger.info(f"当前响应状态: {hist_resp}")
        time.sleep(poll_interval)
    
    raise TimeoutError("等待超时，仍未生成结果！")

def get_images_by_polling(workflow):
    """
    1) 把 workflow 作为 prompt 提交到 /prompt
    2) 拿到 prompt_id
    3) 轮询 get_history(prompt_id) 判断是否完成
    4) 如果完成，从 outputs 里下载所有图片并返回
    """
    # 提交到队列
    resp = queue_prompt(workflow)
    prompt_id = resp['prompt_id']
    # logger.info(f"获得 prompt_id: {prompt_id}")

    # 轮询直到有结果
    record = poll_result_until_ready(prompt_id)
    outputs = record.get('outputs', {})

    # 下载并转成 PIL
    output_images = {}
    # logger.info("开始下载生成的图像...")
    for node_id, node_data in outputs.items():
        if 'images' in node_data:
            images_output = []
            for image_info in node_data['images']:
                img_data = get_image(
                    image_info['filename'],
                    image_info['subfolder'],
                    image_info['type']
                )
                images_output.append(img_data)
            output_images[node_id] = images_output
            # logger.info(f"节点 {node_id} 的图像下载完成")
    return output_images

def network_link_test():
    """
    执行网络链接测试，将固定图像通过ComfyUI工作流处理并返回结果图像
    
    """
    start_time = time.time()
    
    # 生成唯一的文件名
    input_filename = f"input_{str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]}.png"
    
    # 使用固定的图像路径，确保使用正确的路径格式
    # 使用绝对路径来避免路径问题
    current_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
    fixed_image_path = os.path.join(current_dir, "assets", "img", "logo_onetech.png")    
    # 上传固定图像
    try:
        up_input = upload_image(fixed_image_path, input_filename)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[Network Link Test] 上传图像失败: {str(e)}")
        score_data = {
        "Time": int(time.time() * 1000),
        "Code": "501",
        "Status": "Upload failed",
        "time": round(time.time() - start_time, 2)
        }
        # Call the function and print the result
        result = update_feishu_record(score_data)
        pass
    
    # 加载network_link_test.json工作流配置，使用绝对路径
    json_path = os.path.join(current_dir, "assets", "comfyui", "network_link_test.json")
    

    # 创建一个简单的默认工作流
    default_workflow = {
        "1": {
            "inputs": {
            "images": [
                "2",
                0
            ]
            },
            "class_type": "PreviewImage",
            "_meta": {
            "title": "预览图像"
            }
        },
        "2": {
            "inputs": {
            "image": "1SazP6cjDOxjO0h2S27Zn3aLsmCWCg.png",
            "upload": "image"
            },
            "class_type": "LoadImage",
            "_meta": {
            "title": "加载图像"
            }
        }
    }
    workflow = default_workflow
    
    # 确保目录存在
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(json_path), exist_ok=True)
    
    # 将默认工作流写入文件
    with open(json_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(workflow, f, indent=2)
    
    # 从上传响应中获取正确的图片名称
    input_name = up_input.get('name', input_filename)
    
    # 更新工作流中的输入图像路径
    workflow["2"]["inputs"]["image"] = input_name  # 输入图像
    
    
    # 获取处理结果
    try:
        images_data = get_images_by_polling(workflow)
        
        # 转换并返回图像数据
        results = []
        for _, img_list in images_data.items():
            for img_data in img_list:
                results.append(img_data)
        
        # print(f"[Network Link Test] 生成 {len(results)} 张图, 耗时 {(time.time() - start_time):.2f} 秒")
        score_data = {
        "Time": int(time.time() * 1000),
        "Code": "200",
        "Status": "Success",
        "time": round(time.time() - start_time, 2)
        }
        
        # Call the function and print the result
        result = update_feishu_record(score_data)
        return []
    except TimeoutError as e:
        restart_time=time.time()
        # print(f"[Network Link Test] 图片上传成功但返回超时: {str(e)}，尝试重试一次")
        # print(oktime)
        # print(f"{(time.time() - oktime):.2f}")
        score_data = {
            "Time": int(time.time() * 1000),
            "Code": "502",
            "Status": "Upload successfully but return timed out",
            "time": round(time.time() - start_time, 2)
            }
        
            # Call the function and print the result
        result = update_feishu_record(score_data)

        try:
            # 重新获取处理结果
            images_data = get_images_by_polling(workflow)
            
            # 转换并返回图像数据
            results = []
            for _, img_list in images_data.items():
                for img_data in img_list:
                    results.append(img_data)
            
            score_data = {
            "Time": int(time.time() * 1000),
            "Code": "200",
            "Status": "Success",
            "time": round(time.time() - restart_time, 2)
            }
        
            # Call the function and print the result
            result = update_feishu_record(score_data)
            return []
        except Exception as retry_e:
            # 重试也失败
            # print(f"[Network Link Test] 重试失败: {str(retry_e)}")
            score_data = {
            "Time": int(time.time() * 1000),
            "Code": "502",
            "Status": "Upload successfully but return timed out (retry)",
            "time": round(time.time() - restart_time, 2)
            }
        
            # Call the function and print the result
            result = update_feishu_record(score_data)
            pass
    except Exception as e:
        # 其他错误
        pass

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="统一任务脚本，使用轮询方式，无需WebSocket连接")
    parser.add_argument("--task", type=str, required=True,
                        choices=["tryon"],
                        help="要执行的任务类型")

    # tryon
    parser.add_argument("--model", type=str, default="", help="模特图(用于tryon)")
    parser.add_argument("--cloth", type=str, default="", help="衣服图(用于tryon)")
    parser.add_argument("--mask", type=str, default="", help="遮罩图(用于tryon)")

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 如果需要保存输出图片，则先确保输出目录存在
    output_dir = "outputs"
    if not os.path.exists(output_dir):
        os.makedirs(output_dir)

    # 根据 task 调用对应函数
    if args.task == "tryon":
        imgs = do_tryon(
            model_image=args.model,
            cloth_image=args.cloth,
            mask_image=args.cloth
        )
        # logger.info(f"[DONE] 共获得 {len(imgs)} 张图片")

        # ---- 新增：保存图片到本地 ----
        for i, img in enumerate(imgs):
            # 输出文件名： task_index.png
            filename = f"{args.task}_{i}.png"
            save_path = os.path.join(output_dir, filename)
            img.save(save_path)

def sora_generate_video(
    prompt: str,
    model: str = "sora-2",
    seconds: Optional[int] = None,
    size: Optional[str] = None,
    input_reference: Optional[str] = None,
    poll_interval: int = 5,
    input_reference_file: Optional[Tuple[str, bytes, str]] = None,
    progress_callback: Optional[Callable[[int, str], None]] = None,
):
    payload = {
        "model": model,
        "prompt": prompt,
    }
    if seconds is not None:
        if seconds not in {4, 8, 12}:
            raise ValueError("seconds must be one of 4, 8, or 12 for Sora")
        payload["seconds"] = str(seconds)
    if size:
        payload["size"] = size
    if input_reference and input_reference_file is None:
        payload["input_reference"] = input_reference

    if input_reference_file is not None:
        files = {key: (None, value) for key, value in payload.items() if value is not None}
        files["input_reference"] = input_reference_file
        response = _request_with_retry(
            "post",
            _build_openai_url("/videos"),
            headers=_openai_headers(),
            files=files,
            max_attempts=3,
            backoff=2.0,
        )
    else:
        response = _request_with_retry(
            "post",
            _build_openai_url("/videos"),
            headers=_openai_headers({"Content-Type": "application/json"}),
            json=payload,
            max_attempts=3,
            backoff=2.0,
        )
    video = response.json()
    status = video.get("status", "queued")
    video_id = video.get("id")
    if progress_callback:
        progress_callback(video.get("progress", 0) or 0, status)

    while status in ("queued", "in_progress"):
        time.sleep(max(1, poll_interval))
        poll_resp = _request_with_retry(
            "get",
            _build_openai_url(f"/videos/{video_id}"),
            headers=_openai_headers(),
            max_attempts=3,
            backoff=2.0,
        )
        video = poll_resp.json()
        status = video.get("status", "unknown")
        if progress_callback:
            progress_callback(video.get("progress", 0) or 0, status)

    if status == "failed":
        error = video.get("error") or {}
        message = error.get("message", "Video generation failed")
        raise RuntimeError(message)

    if progress_callback:
        progress_callback(video.get("progress", 100) or 100, status)

    return video

def runway_video_to_video(prompt):
    """
    RunwayML video to video generation using gen4_aleph model
    
    Args:
        prompt (dict): Dictionary containing:
            - videoUri (str): HTTPS URL pointing to a video or data URI containing a video
            - promptText (str): Non-empty string up to 1000 characters describing the output
            - model (str): Must be set to 'gen4_aleph'
            - ratio (str): Resolution of output video (e.g., '1280:720', '720:1280', '960:960')
            - seed (int, optional): Integer between 0 and 4294967295 for reproducible results
            - references (list, optional): List of reference objects with type and uri
            - contentModeration (dict, optional): Content moderation settings
    
    Returns:
        task: Completed task object with generated video
    """
    # 构建请求参数
    request_params = {
        "model": "gen4_aleph",  # 固定值
        "video_uri": prompt["videoUri"],
        "prompt_text": prompt["promptText"],
        "ratio": prompt["ratio"]
    }
    
    # 可选参数
    if "seed" in prompt:
        request_params["seed"] = prompt["seed"]
    
    if "references" in prompt and prompt["references"]:
        request_params["references"] = prompt["references"]
    
    if "contentModeration" in prompt:
        request_params["content_moderation"] = prompt["contentModeration"]
    
    task = client.video_to_video.create(**request_params).wait_for_task_output()
    
    return task

def runway_text_to_image(prompt):
    """
    使用 Runway Gen4 模型进行文本到图像生成
    
    Args:
        prompt (dict): 包含以下键的字典:
            - prompt_text (str): 文本提示，最大1000字符
            - ratio (str): 图像比例，支持多种分辨率
            - model (str): 模型类型，可选 "gen4_image" 或 "gen4_image_turbo"
            - seed (int, optional): 随机种子，范围 0-4294967295
            - reference_images (list, optional): 参考图像列表，最多3张
            - content_moderation (dict, optional): 内容审核设置
    
    Returns:
        task: 完成的任务对象
    """
    # 构建任务参数 - 使用正确的API参数名称
    task_params = {
        'model': prompt.get("model", "gen4_image"),
        'prompt_text': prompt["prompt_text"],  # API使用 promptText
        'ratio': prompt.get("ratio", "1360:768")
    }
    
    # 如果提供了种子，则添加到参数中
    if "seed" in prompt:
        task_params['seed'] = prompt["seed"]
    
    # 如果提供了参考图像，则添加到参数中（Python SDK 使用 snake_case: reference_images）
    if "reference_images" in prompt and prompt["reference_images"]:
        task_params['reference_images'] = prompt["reference_images"]
    
    # 如果提供了内容审核设置，则添加到参数中
    if "content_moderation" in prompt and prompt["content_moderation"]:
        task_params['content_moderation'] = {
            "publicFigureThreshold": prompt["content_moderation"].get("publicFigureThreshold", "auto")
        }
    
    # 创建任务
    task = client.text_to_image.create(**task_params)
    task_id = task.id
    
    # 等待任务完成
    time.sleep(10)  # 初始等待
    task = client.tasks.retrieve(task_id)
    while task.status not in ['SUCCEEDED', 'FAILED']:
        time.sleep(5)
        task = client.tasks.retrieve(task_id)
    
    if task.status == 'FAILED':
        raise Exception(task)
    else:
        return task

def runway_video_upscale(prompt):

    return task

def get_model():
    if torch.cuda.is_available():
        device = torch.device("cuda")
        # use bfloat16 for the entire notebook
        torch.autocast("cuda", dtype=torch.bfloat16).__enter__()
        # turn on tfloat32 for Ampere GPUs (https://pytorch.org/docs/stable/notes/cuda.html#tensorfloat-32-tf32-on-ampere-devices)
        if torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).major >= 8:
            torch.backends.cuda.matmul.allow_tf32 = True
            torch.backends.cudnn.allow_tf32 = True
    # elif torch.backends.mps.is_available():
    #     device = torch.device("mps")
    # else:
    #     device = torch.device("cpu")
    predictor = SAM2ImagePredictor(build_sam2(model_cfg, checkpoint, device=("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")))

    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
    return predictor

def show_mask(mask, random_color=False, borders = False):
    if random_color:
        color = np.concatenate([np.random.random(3), np.array([0.6])], axis=0)
    else:
        color = np.array([30/255, 144/255, 255/255, 0.6])
    h, w = mask.shape[-2:]
    mask = mask.astype(np.uint8)
    mask_image =  mask.reshape(h, w, 1) * color.reshape(1, 1, -1)
    if borders:
        import cv2
        contours, _ = cv2.findContours(mask,cv2.RETR_EXTERNAL, cv2.CHAIN_APPROX_NONE) 
        # Try to smooth contours
        contours = [cv2.approxPolyDP(contour, epsilon=0.01, closed=True) for contour in contours]
        mask_image = cv2.drawContours(mask_image, contours, -1, (1, 1, 1, 0.5), thickness=2) 
    return mask_image

def call_xts_visual_search(image_search_input):
    def chunked_data(data, chunk_size=1048576):
        """Generator to yield chunked data."""
        for i in range(0, len(data), chunk_size):
            yield data[i:i + chunk_size]

    xts_visual_uri = "https://hddubn5swsuwa62vzvoxcebcje0uslkr.lambda-url.ap-southeast-1.on.aws/"
    xts_visual_headers = {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "apiKey": XTS_API_KEY,
        "Transfer-Encoding": "chunked"
    }

    image = Image.open(image_search_input)
    image_file_name = image_search_input.name
    image_format = image.format
    base64_content = base64.b64encode(image_search_input.getvalue()).decode("utf-8")

    xts_visual_body = {
        "file_name": image_file_name,
        "file_type": image_format,
        "mime_type": "image/" + image_format,
        "base64_content": base64_content
    }

    # Convert the body to JSON and then to bytes
    data_bytes = json.dumps(xts_visual_body).encode()

    # Make the POST request with chunked encoding
    xts_visual_response = requests.post(
        xts_visual_uri,
        data=chunked_data(data_bytes),
        headers=xts_visual_headers
    )
    return xts_visual_response
